# IT Request Template

## Request Code

To be generated by the system.

## Title

Short summary of the request.

## Description

Detailed explanation of the request.

## Type

Approved request type value.

## Priority

Approved priority value.

## Status

Approved request status value.

## Requested By

User who requested the work.

## Requested For Department

Department receiving the work.

## Assigned To

User responsible for follow-up.

## Required Date

Date when the work is needed.

## Related Tasks

Tasks created for this request.

## Comments

Request comments.
